lines.speaker: Dumpy
lines.text: What is it, human? I'm working.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I use the furnace?

lines.speaker: Dumpy
lines.text: Put your ore on the conveyor belt to get it smelted. We'll stoke the boiler and operate the rest of the machinery for you.

lines.speaker: Dumpy
lines.text: You'll have to help repair the furnace whenever a pipe blows, though. Just hit it with a hammer - that usually works.

lines.speaker: Dumpy
lines.text: You'll have to put money in the coffer to pay for our services. We charge 72,000 coins per hour; money is deducted as long as you're in this room with us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Gosh, you're a remarkably big dwarf.

lines.speaker: Dumpy
lines.text: My brothers and I have a rare genetic condition affecting our growth. Rather than treating us as freaks, you might like to appreciate how useful it is that we can operate the machinery.

lines.speaker: Dumpy
lines.text: That's ok, human. You're not the first to comment on it. Now, did you need anything? I've got work to do here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you sure you're really a dwarf?

lines.speaker: Dumpy
lines.text: ... look, do you want help with something, or did you just come here to be rude? I've got work to do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll let you get on with it.
